emails.subject: MUD 23 Access & Maintenance Agreement
emails.body: MUD 23 Access Maintenance Agreement Dan, Ann Elizabeth prepared an agreement last week whereby Harris County MUD No. 23 would be allowed certain access across HPL Bammel property to do work on their drainage ditches. After a review of the agreement by Steve Schneider, he suggested that language be added concerning a matting of the property over the pipelines when "heavy machinery" is used. Also, he suggested that language as to property/road restoration be added. Taffy, can you email a copy of the agreement to Dan so he can make these changes (I was only provided hard copies)? Please let me know if you have any questions! Thank you very much, r

emails.subject: Re: MUD 23 Access & Maintenance Agreement
emails.body: Re: MUD 23 Access Maintenance Agreement Robert, I have modified the attached as requested. Robert Rose@ENRON 05/30/2001 03:48 PM
